story.iWant: utility functions for common service composition patterns
story.soThat: I can build complex service graphs quickly and reliably

tasks.task: Implement ServiceChain utility for sequential service execution
Implement ServiceProxy utility for transparent service forwarding
Implement ServiceBranch utility for conditional service routing
Implement ServiceMerger utility for result aggregation
Ensure type safety and interface contract preservation
Implement comprehensive error handling and propagation
Document performance characteristics and create benchmarks
Support both static and dynamic composition patterns
Validate interface compatibility and provide clear error messages

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Composition Pattern Utilities: Framework provides helper functions for common service composition patterns (ServiceChain, ServiceProxy, ServiceBranch, ServiceMerger)
Type Safety Preservation: All composition utilities maintain full type safety and preserve interface contracts throughout the composition chain
Error Flow Management: Error handling propagates correctly through composed service chains with proper context and error aggregation
Performance Documentation: Each composition pattern has documented performance characteristics with benchmark data and optimization guidance
Static and Dynamic Composition: Utilities support both compile-time service composition (static configuration) and runtime composition (dynamic service assembly)
Interface Contract Validation: Composition utilities validate interface compatibility and provide clear error messages for mismatched service interfaces

artifact.title: Product Requirements Document
artifact.snippet: FR19: Middleware pattern enables cross-cutting concerns (extended to full service composition patterns). Provides foundation for complex service hierarchies using simple patterns.

artifact.title: Refactored Architecture Document
artifact.snippet: Decorator pattern with middleware pipeline enables ServiceChain, ServiceProxy, ServiceBranch, and ServiceMerger utilities through type-safe composition with zero overhead abstractions.

artifact.title: Epic 3 Technical Specification
artifact.snippet: CompositionPattern interface with Execute, Validate, and GetServices methods. ServiceChain for sequential execution, ServiceProxy for transparent forwarding, ServiceBranch for conditional routing, ServiceMerger for result aggregation.

artifact.title: Epic Breakdown
artifact.snippet: Helper functions for common service composition patterns with type safety, error handling, performance documentation, and both static and dynamic composition support.

artifact.title: Shared Dependency Management Implementation
artifact.snippet: Dependency scoping foundation, health monitoring integration, concurrent access safety, and performance optimization provide patterns for composition utilities to leverage shared dependencies efficiently.

artifact.reason: Core service interfaces that composition utilities will work with and extend
Service implementation with middleware decoration patterns to extend for composition utilities
Service embedding implementation providing foundation for composition utility patterns
Dependency injection container for automatic dependency resolution across composed services
Shared dependency management that composition utilities must integrate with for efficient resource sharing
Middleware pipeline infrastructure that composition utilities must leverage for cross-cutting concerns
Request context structure that composition utilities will pass through service chains
Error handling patterns for composition utility error aggregation and propagation

story-context.constraints: - Performance: Composition overhead < 10μs per service in chain, < 50μs for complex branched compositions - Type Safety: Full compile-time type checking with generic constraints and interface validation - Error Resilience: Graceful degradation with clear error boundaries and structured error aggregation - Developer Experience: Intuitive composition APIs with fluent interfaces and clear error messages - Flexibility: Support both simple chaining patterns and complex orchestration scenarios - Integration: Must integrate with sdk/di/ container for automatic dependency injection across composed services - Middleware: Must leverage sdk/middleware/ pipeline to ensure cross-cutting concerns apply to all services - Shared Dependencies: Must integrate with shared dependency management from sdk/di/shared.go for efficient resource utilization - Interface Compliance: All composition utilities must preserve EndorServiceInterface and EndorHybridServiceInterface contracts - Zero Overhead: Abstractions must have zero runtime performance penalty when not using composition features - Memory Optimization: Composition patterns must minimize memory allocation through shared dependency integration

interface.name: CompositionPattern
ServiceProxy
interface.signature: func ServiceProxy[T any](target EndorServiceInterface, interceptor ProxyInterceptor) ProxiedService[T]

interface.name: ServiceBranch
interface.signature: func ServiceBranch[T any](router BranchRouter, services map[string]EndorServiceInterface) BranchedService[T]

interface.name: ServiceMerger
interface.signature: func ServiceMerger[T any](services []EndorServiceInterface, merger ResultMerger) MergedService[T]

interface.name: CompositionValidator

tests.standards: Go testing framework with testify/assert for assertions. Interface mocking using testutils package. Benchmarking using testing.B for performance validation. Integration tests using real services with dependency injection. Table-driven tests for composition pattern variations. Property-based testing for composition validation edge cases.

ideas.testIdea: TestServiceChain_SequentialExecution: Verify ServiceChain executes services in order with proper data flow
TestServiceProxy_TransparentForwarding: Validate ServiceProxy forwards requests with optional transformation
TestServiceBranch_ConditionalRouting: Test ServiceBranch routes to correct service based on request analysis
TestServiceMerger_ResultAggregation: Verify ServiceMerger combines results from multiple services correctly
TestComposition_TypeSafety: Validate compile-time type checking and generic constraints work across all utilities
TestComposition_InterfacePreservation: Ensure composed services maintain original interface contracts
TestComposition_ErrorPropagation: Verify error handling flows correctly through composed service chains
TestComposition_ErrorAggregation: Test error aggregation in parallel compositions (ServiceMerger)
BenchmarkComposition_Performance: Measure composition overhead vs Epic 3 targets (< 10μs per service)
TestComposition_PerformanceDocumentation: Validate documented performance characteristics match actual measurements
TestComposition_StaticConfiguration: Test compile-time service composition with configuration
TestComposition_DynamicAssembly: Verify runtime service composition and hot-swapping
TestComposition_InterfaceValidation: Test interface compatibility checking with clear error messages
TestComposition_CircularDependencyDetection: Verify dependency graph analysis prevents circular compositions
